㛳 Infrastructure for scalable, personalized AI systems
㛳 Infrastructure for scalable, personalized AI systems
Why This Course Focuses on Mobile AI
• Mobile computing has evolved toward intelligence at the edge
⚬ Today㐴s mobile systems are AI㎿driven: perception, language, decision㎿making
⚬ On㎿device AI is now a core systems problem ㏙efficiency, memory, energy㏚
⚬ Mobile LLMs and agents represent the current research frontier
⚬ Edge㎿cloud collaboration is central to scalable deployment
⚬ Robotics and embodied AI inherit mobile computing constraints
• 㛳 Studying mobile computing today naturally means studying mobile AI and

• Since Mobile HCI and Applications cover a very broad range of topics and
research directions, it is often easier to understand the field through concrete

Applications look like in practice, and they may also inspire ideas for your

• Consider the areas we cover in this course:
